description.en-US: Milesight EM410-RDL — LoRaWAN (Class A) sensor that monitors distance / level and temperature. Uplinks are channel-TLV frames on FPort 85.
description.pt-BR: Milesight EM410-RDL — sensor LoRaWAN (Classe A) que monitora distância / nível e temperatura. Os uplinks são quadros channel-TLV no FPort 85.
